security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Turn images into usable trim sheets.
bundle.longDescription: A focused native desktop application for extracting patches, creating trim layouts, generating maps, previewing, and exporting.
